Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5092 0 0}Who could that be? I don't think it's anyone we've come across before.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 52 50 0 0}His reading is so strange... It's powerful, but at the same time... It kind of feels like he's not really there at all.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}And why is he appearing in front of us so confidently all of a sudden?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5003 0 0}Aigis, if you're thinking about approaching him, please prepare as best as you can first.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}I can't tell what his intentions are, but I have a bad feeling...[n]{f 1 1}
